title: 6 PCS Squishy Toys, Squishies Toys, Squishys Assorted Squeeze Stress Relief Toys for Kids Adults Anxiety Relief Sensory Toys Halloween Easter Party Favors
features: Squishy Paw: This 6-piece set features charming designs like the Pink Sugar Cookie, Black Sugar Cookie, Chicken, Purple Cat Paw, Cream Hamster, Beige Hamster. Each toy offers a satisfying squish sensation that helps alleviate stress, anxiety, or restlessness, making them ideal for improving focus during work or study. The big size fits perfectly in hands, pockets, or bags, ensuring stress relief is always within reach. The Purple Cat Paw’s textured toe beans add an extra layer of sensory engagement, enhancing the calming experience.

Paw Squishy: Our Paw Squishy toys blend cuteness with therapeutic benefits. The standout Purple Cat Paw design combines a plush exterior with a squishy interior, providing a comforting squeeze that soothes both kids and adults. Squeezing the slow-rising material helps release tension, making it a great tool for fidgeting or managing anxiety. The vibrant colors and lifelike animal textures add a playful element, encouraging imaginative play while delivering stress relief. Durable and easy to clean, these toys withstand daily squishing without losing their shape or charm.

Squeeze Toys: The sugar cookie designs feature realistic icing details and a smooth surface, while the Chicken offers a soft, squeezable body with gentle ridges for tactile variety. Lightweight and portable, these toys are for relieving boredom during commutes, travel, or long study sessions. Their versatile appeal makes them suitable for both sensory play and as decorative desk accessories.

Big Squishy: The slow-rising material provides a luxurious, almost therapeutic sensation, making them for those who prefer a more intense stress-relief experience. The neutral tones of the Cream and Beige Hamsters blend seamlessly with any environment, while the bold colors of the Purple Cat Paw and sugar cookies add a pop of personality. This set is a must-have for squishy enthusiasts or anyone looking to add a touch of fun to their stress-management routine.
